changeSet.author: openelis
changeSet.comment: Fix analyzer_file_upload.analyzer_id type (INT->NUMERIC) and set ON DELETE SET NULL for audit trail preservation

changeSet.author: openelis
changeSet.comment: Fix notebook_analysers.analyser_id type (INTEGER->NUMERIC) and set ON DELETE RESTRICT

changeSet.author: openelis
changeSet.comment: Add ON DELETE CASCADE to analyzer config/setup FK tables

changeSet.author: openelis
changeSet.comment: Add ON DELETE CASCADE to tables referencing analyzer_field, enabling full cascade: analyzer -> analyzer_field -> children

changeSet.author: openelis
changeSet.comment: Change analyzer_error FK to SET NULL — error logs must survive analyzer deletion for compliance

changeSet.author: openelis
changeSet.comment: Change analyzer_results FK to RESTRICT — clinical results must be explicitly handled before analyzer deletion

rollback.sql: ALTER TABLE clinlims.analyzer_results DROP CONSTRAINT IF EXISTS analyzer_fk; ALTER TABLE clinlims.analyzer_results ADD CONSTRAINT analyzer_fk FOREIGN KEY (analyzer_id) REFERENCES clinlims.analyzer(id);
